title: Freecam+
description: This is a Freecam mod that allows you to see as you would in spectator mode without admin just by pressing \.
body:
Aether Freecam is a simple client-side freecam mod for Fabric on Minecraft 26.1.2.

Detach your camera from your player, fly around smoothly, and inspect builds or take screenshots without moving your real body.

Features:
- Toggleable freecam
- Adjustable movement speed
- Smooth detached camera movement
- Hidden hand/item rendering while freecam is active
- Client-side only

Default controls:
- `\` Toggle Freecam
- `Page Up` Increase Speed
- `Page Down` Decrease Speed

Notes:
- Designed primarily for client-side use and screenshots
- In multiplayer, chunk loading is still limited by what the server sends to your real player

Credits:
- Developed by Kai, with implementation help from OpenAI Codex
